docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - SERVED NOV-02-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LOW, KEN

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 (FORM STAMPED:"FILED PURSUANT TO LITIGANT'S REQUEST") FILED BY MILLER, NANCY AS TO DEFENDANT LOW, KEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-11-2014 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-11-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-11-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-11-2014 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MILLER, NANCY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LOW, KEN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
